content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9650338/", "source_title": "Intermittent fasting and time-restricted eating role in dietary ... - PMC", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Randomized controlled trials suggested that the weight loss associated with IF is due to a reduced energy intake due to time restriction.", "direct_quote": "Randomized controlled trials suggested that the weight loss associated with IF is due to a reduced energy intake due to time restriction.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Although the supervised TRE clinical trials documented the dietary caloric intake, many free-living studies focused on the timing of meals...", "direct_quote": "Although the supervised TRE clinical trials documented the dietary caloric intake, many free-living studies focused on the timing of meals without a complete characterization of the dietary intake, caloric density, or macronutrient composition.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "It is possible that both caloric-restriction diets and time-restriction protocols could work synergistically or additively to improve...", "direct_quote": "It is possible that both caloric-restriction diets and time-restriction protocols could work synergistically or additively to improve metabolic health outcomes.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Intermittent fasting and time-restricted eating role in diet."}]}
